description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117. He logged 19 hrs 38 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 8 mins per day. His tracked work was mostly in Python, Markdown, SQL, and TypeScript across 4 projects.
